title: Frontend Developer
description: Responsible for building and maintaining web UI using React, JavaScript, and modern frontend tooling.

title: Backend Developer
description: Design and develop RESTful APIs, work with Node.js and databases, and ensure scalability and security.

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: Work across frontend and backend stacks to deliver new features and maintain existing systems.

title: UI/UX Designer
description: Create wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity designs for web and mobile applications.

title: Product Manager
description: Own product vision, gather requirements, prioritize roadmap, and collaborate with engineering and design teams.

title: Data Analyst
description: Analyze datasets, build dashboards, and provide data-driven insights to stakeholders.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Manage CI/CD pipelines, cloud infrastructure, and monitoring tools to ensure reliable deployments.

title: Mobile App Developer
description: Develop and maintain Android and iOS applications with React Native or Flutter.

title: QA Engineer
description: Write test cases, perform manual and automated testing, and ensure product quality before release.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Build and deploy machine learning models, work with Python, and optimize model performance.

title: Technical Support Engineer
description: Provide technical support to customers, troubleshoot issues, and document common problems.

title: Systems Administrator
description: Maintain servers, networks, and security systems to ensure uptime and performance.

title: Content Writer
description: Write blog posts, landing page copy, and marketing content optimized for SEO.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description: Plan and execute digital campaigns, manage social media, and track performance metrics.

title: HR Generalist
description: Handle recruitment, onboarding, employee relations, and HR documentation.

title: Business Analyst
description: Gather requirements, document processes, and work with stakeholders to improve business workflows.

title: Graphic Designer
description: Design marketing materials, social media graphics, and brand assets using modern tools.

title: Sales Executive
description: Reach out to potential clients, maintain relationships, and achieve sales targets.

title: Customer Success Manager
description: Ensure customers achieve value from the product, manage renewals, and reduce churn.

title: Project Manager
description: Plan and track project timelines, manage resources, and communicate progress to stakeholders.
